steps.t: You can find sapphire fireflies around Dol Ringwest, near Duillond, from gloaming till dawn. You should collect fireflies for the wedding planner in M…
The wedding planner Merilien is located on the Seventh Circle of Minas Tirith. Return to Minas Tirith with the firefly-filled lanterns.
The Court of Voronwë is on the southern side of the Fourth Circle of Minas Tirith. You should place sapphire firefly lanterns in the Court of Voronwë.
